notes: v3.0.21 - Hotfix release. CHK-182 (P0): fixes conversion regression in v3.0.20 (last_keystroke_time was read just after being updated to NOW, tripping the mid-word-BS flag on every BS). Fix: added prev_keystroke_time, rotated at top of keystroke handler. CHK-191: tray Quit closes on first click (show + unminimize before set_focus). CHK-190: cap banner moved to bottom (was overlaying logo). 11 unit tests passing.
